positive: A minimalist, stylized depiction of a majestic mountain range and clear sky, designed as a repeating pattern or a central, isolated graphic element. The style should be modern linocut art mixed with graphic vector aesthetics, featuring clean, bold silhouettes and strong geometric contrast. The color palette is restricted to deep indigo, charcoal black, and creamy ivory, allowing for excellent print contrast on various backgrounds. The composition should emphasize negative space and high readability for apparel printing. Include stylized crescent moon and geometric stars subtly integrated into the upper sky area. Aspect ratio is square for optimal print transfer.
negative: blur, photographic, photorealism, complex shading, excessive detail, noise, text, watermark, signature, bad anatomy, artifacts, low resolution, fuzzy, messy, logos, trademarks, cropped, extra limbs
